tagline: Building production RAG chatbots, multi-client workflow automation, and WhatsApp lead-nurturing systems with Python, LangChain, and no-code orchestration.
description: AI & Automation Engineer with 1+ year of hands-on experience delivering production RAG chatbots, multi-client workflow automation, and WhatsApp lead-nurturing systems across Python, REST APIs, LLMs, and tools like n8n, Make, and Zapier.

roles.detailed: AI Engineer | Automation Engineer | Backend Developer

bio: AI & Automation Engineer with 1+ year of hands-on experience delivering production RAG chatbots, multi-client workflow automation, and WhatsApp lead-nurturing systems. Comfortable across the full stack — Python back-end, REST API design, LLM integration with OpenAI and LangChain, and no-code orchestration with n8n, Make, and Zapier. Built and deployed solutions for 10+ clients, cutting manual effort and improving conversion rates measurably.

bullets: Built and deployed RAG-based website support chatbots using Python, LangChain, and FAISS for 5+ clients; reduced customer query resolution time by ~40%.
Engineered WhatsApp automation bots via WhatsApp Business API and n8n for 3 clients, increasing response rate by 60%.
Designed reusable end-to-end automation pipelines connecting CRMs, email platforms, and social media APIs, eliminating 15+ hours/week of manual data entry per client.
Managed and optimized paid ad campaigns on Meta Ads and Google Ads for 10+ client accounts with analytics-driven iteration.
Conducted client discovery sessions to translate business requirements into technical specs and deliver customised automation solutions.
experience.desc: Production AI chatbots, WhatsApp automation, and multi-platform workflow pipelines for marketing and lead-generation clients.

projects.title: RAG-Powered Website Support Chatbot
projects.subtitle: Intelligent Document Retrieval
projects.desc: Ingests client website content and PDFs, chunks and embeds using OpenAI embeddings stored in FAISS, and serves context-aware answers via a FastAPI REST endpoint — reducing hallucination rate by ~70% versus a vanilla LLM baseline.

projects.title: Multi-Client Automation Workflow Engine
projects.subtitle: Reusable n8n Framework
projects.desc: A parameterised, reusable n8n automation framework integrating CRMs, email providers, and social media APIs — processing 500+ automated events daily and cutting new-client onboarding time by 50%.

projects.title: WhatsApp Lead Nurturing Bot
projects.subtitle: CRM-Integrated Drip Sequences
projects.desc: Automated 3-stage drip message sequences triggered by user actions via webhooks, integrated with CRM data for lead segmentation and personalised outreach — saving 8 hours/week of manual sales outreach per client.

publications.title: B.E. Mechanical Engineering
publications.platform: Nehru Institute of Engineering and Technology
publications.desc: Bachelor of Engineering in Mechanical Engineering from Nehru Institute of Engineering and Technology, Coimbatore — Anna University (2021–2024).

publications.title: Self-Directed AI & Automation Upskilling
publications.desc: Python programming, machine learning fundamentals, LLM application development, REST API integration, and production automation with n8n, Make, and Zapier.
